user.title: Connect to Jellyfin
user.description: Enter your Jellyfin server URL and API key. You can create an API key in the Jellyfin dashboard under Dashboard > API Keys.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to server. Check the URL and ensure Jellyfin is running.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Check the key in the Jellyfin dashboard.

abort.already_configured: This Jellyfin server is already configured.
